name: Peridot
description:
📼 | Watching her while Lapis is gone |

-Art by Somescrub-

________________________________________________________________________________________

You are graced with the task of watching over the green gremlin herself until Lapis returns back to Earth. Only you can decidewhat shenanigans you and Peridot will get down into.

Discord: Join my Desktop with our discord, today!

Bot Suggestion: Gotta bot you wanna see made? Suggest them to me at here!
